reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 목줄이 너무 너무 귀엽습니다. 애견카페 가서 어디 목줄이냐고 많이 물어보셔요. 저희 강아지가 중대형견인데 디자인도 이쁘고 무엇보다 두께가 두툼해서 마음에 들어요!
reviews.content_en: The leash is so so cute! People at dog cafes ask us all the time where we got it. My pup is a large/medium-sized dog, and I love both the design and especially how thick and sturdy it is!

reviews.name: 안****
reviews.content:
엄청 고민하다 바잇미를 알고 구매했어요. 
마침 방수목줄을 찾던 중 예쁜 색감때문에 또 고민하고 구매했어요.
상품 받아보고 핸드폰으로 보던 색감보다 더 예쁘고, 부드럽고, 가벼웠어요. 줄이 젖으면 잘 마르지도 않고 굉장히 찝찝하고, 세탁 후에도 잘 안마르고 냄새가  잘 안 빠지는데, 관리하기 편하겠어요.
reviews.content_en: I thought about it a lot before finding out about BITE ME and buying it. I was looking for a waterproof leash and ended up buying it again because of the pretty colors. When I got the product, it was even prettier than what I saw on my phone, and it was soft and lightweight. The cord doesn't dry well when wet and feels really uncomfortable, and even after washing it doesn't dry easily and the smell doesn't come out, but it should be convenient to manage.

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 저는 하네스보다 목줄을 선호하는 편인데 지금까진 맘에드는 목줄을 못찾고 한두번 쓰고 집에 굴러다니는 목줄 천지였어요! 애가 작아서 무게부터 버클까지 한개가 맘에들면 소재가 맘에안들구 이런식으로 일년 넘게 이것저것 사모으기만 하다가 방수 목줄이라길래 천소재에 생활 방수된 건줄알고 색이예뻐서 구매한건데 고무? 같은 느낌의 처음 써보는 재질이 왔더라구요! 결론은 요즘 완전 최애템이에요.. ㅋㅋㅋㅋ 사실 리뷰가 아니고 노란색도 재구매 하려구 들어온건데 생각나서 써요! 저한테는 어께에 매면 리드줄이 좀 길어서 최대한 줄여서 쓰느라 풉백이 바닥에 끌릴려고 하지만 ㅋㅋ 일단 색이 너무 예쁘구 한달내내 매일 써도 땅에 많이 닿는 부분 색조금 변한거 말고는 튼튼해요! 저는 그럼 다른색을 구매하러 가겠습니당 총총 아 저희 강아지는 2.3키로 비숑이에요! 겁이 있는편이라 큰소리 나는 버클이나 무거운 목줄은 들면 바로 도망가요ㅋㅋㅋ
reviews.content_en: I prefer leashes over harnesses, but until now I couldn't find one I really liked—my home was full of leashes I used once or twice and then threw aside! Since my pup is small, whenever I liked one thing like the weight or buckle, I didn't like the material, and I've been collecting different ones for over a year like this. Someone mentioned a waterproof leash, so I thought it was a fabric with water resistance and bought it for the pretty color, but I got this rubber-like material I'd never tried before! To sum it up, it's become my absolute favorite item these days... lol honestly I came here to repurchase the yellow one, not really to leave a review, but I remembered and wrote this! For me, when I put it over my shoulder the lead is a bit long so I adjust it as much as possible and the pull-back scrapes the ground lol but anyway the color is so pretty and even wearing it every day for a month, except for some slight color change on the parts that touch the ground a lot, it's really durable! I'm off to buy another color then bye bye 😊 Oh, our pup is a 2.3kg Bichon Frise! He's a bit timid so when he hears loud buckle sounds or sees a heavy leash, he runs away right away lol

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content:
바잇미 제품에 요즘 엄청 푹빠진 1인입니다...
충동구매 욕구가 엄청나네요 ㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋ
바잇미 디자인이 너무 마음에 들고, 제가 원하는 구성이 완벽해서
요새 폭풍 구매중입니다 ㅎ ㅎ ㅎ 

특히 목줄.... 진짜 이건 ㅠㅠ 상줘야 돼
처음엔 아이 털에 낑겨서 아프진 않을까
면 목줄보단 그립감이 없어서 산책시 불편할까 고민이 됐고
'방수' 라는 특성에 꽂혀서 일단 질렀습니다
왠걸 😭 ㄹㅇ 미쳤어!! 진짜 더러워진 나머지 목줄 다 버렸습니다;;

면 목줄은 맨~ 날 빨고 말리고 빨고 말리고 
비오는날 다 젖고 그냥 ㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋ 불편 너무 불편...
심지어 목줄을 당겨도 실리콘 소재 특성상
텐션이 있어서 켁켁거림이 확실히 줄었어요 

면 목줄로 당기면 엄청 켁켁 거립니다..ㅠㅠ
단, 면 목줄보단 무게가 살짝 나가지만 
금세 적응해서 불편해하지도 않고 채워달라고 목을 대줘요🥹👍

정말이지... 빨고 말리는게 너무 너무 귀찮았는데
이건 방수라 물티슈로 문질문질해주면 새상품으로 돌아와요 ㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋ 진짜 !! 최고 !! 

기존에 쓰던 민트 컬러는 박살이나서...재구매 했구요!
밤이나 신호등 건널때 눈에 띄게하기 위해서
오렌지 컬러가 더 많이 들어간 아프리콧 제품으로 결정했습니다🙌🙌
색감도 파스텔이라 촌스럽지도 않고
채우면 짱짱하니 두말할것도 없어용 ㅎ ㅎ ㅎ

주문한지 하루만에 와서 맘 편히 휴가 다녀올 수 있을듯요!!
🧡🧡 바잇미 너무 살앙해.. ㅠㅠㅠ
reviews.content_en: I'm totally obsessed with BITE ME products these days... The urge to impulse buy is crazy 😄😄😄 I love BITE ME's design so much and it has the perfect configuration I wanted, so I'm on a buying spree these days 😊😊😊 Especially the leash.... this really deserves a medal 😭😭 At first I was worried it might hurt because it gets caught in my pup's fur, and I was concerned the silicone wouldn't have the grip of a cotton leash making walks uncomfortable. I got hooked on the 'waterproof' feature and just went for it. And omg 😭 I'm literally crazy!! I ended up throwing out all my old dirty leashes;; Cotton leashes need constant washing and drying, and they get soaked in the rain, it's just so inconvenient lol lol But with this silicone material, even when you pull, there's tension so the choking/coughing definitely reduced! With a cotton leash I'd pull and he'd cough so much 😭 The only downside is it's slightly heavier than a cotton leash, but he adapted quickly and doesn't seem bothered—he even puts his neck out to have it put on 🥹👍 Seriously... I was so tired of washing and drying constantly, but with this being waterproof, just wiping it with a wet wipe brings it back to brand new lol lol lol Really!! The best!! My original mint color got destroyed so I repurchased it! To make it more visible at night or when crossing at traffic lights, I decided on the apricot product which has more orange tones 🙌🙌 The colors are pastel so they don't look tacky at all, and when you fill it up it's perfectly snug, need I say more 😊😊😊 It arrived the day after I ordered so I can go on vacation worry-free!! 🧡🧡 I love BITE ME so much.. 😭😭😭

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
귀염둥이 울 아가입니당
너무 이쁜목줄이에요 색깔도 이쁘고 울강쥐에게 딱 잘어울려요
아쉬운건 사이즈미스로 ㅠㅠ S로 구매했어야 했는데
제일끝까지 쥴여서 채웠는데 미용하게되면 많이 헐렁거릴것같아요 ㅠㅠ 교환할지 고민했는데 이미 택을 때버린상태라
조심히 써야할거같네용
작은애기도 키우는 다둥이네인데 S로 하나더 구매해야되겠습니당 하네스만 쓰다가 목줄 써보는데 애들도 편하고 당기는것도
줄어드는것같아요
처음쓸때는 아무래도 버클이 많이 뻑뻑하긴하네요
쓰다보면 부드러워질것같아요
튼튼하게 오래쓰고 싶네용!
reviews.content_en: Our adorable little one 💕 It's such a pretty leash, the color is beautiful and fits our pup perfectly! The only downside is I got the size wrong 😭😭 I should have gotten S but I adjusted it to the very end when putting it on, and when we go to the groomer it'll probably be quite loose 😭😭 I thought about exchanging it but I already threw away the tag, so I need to be careful with it. We have multiple small dogs and I need to buy another one in S. Since we usually used harnesses and are trying a regular leash now, the kids seem more comfortable and the pulling seems to have reduced. The buckle is a bit stiff at first but I think it'll soften up with use. I want to use it durably for a long time!

reviews.name: 윤****
reviews.content:
솔직히 목줄은 소형견한테 무조건 나빠! 라는 한심한 주인이 저였어요. 처음에는 그래서 하네스 목줄을 사용했어요. 근데 산책을 너무 안좋아하고 자꾸 안갈려고 고집을 부리는 거예요.
그래서 그때부터 뭐가 문제일까 고민했죠.
처음에는 훈련을 열심히 했어요. 그래도 제자리 걸음인 느낌에 지쳐갈때쯤 저희집 강아지 특성이 생각나더라구요. 안기는 것도 별로 안좋아하고 몸 만지는것도 그닥 안좋아하는 아이가 하네스를?!

그래서 바로 목줄을 구매했죠. 사설이 길었죠? 이 목줄을 사용하고부터 아이가 산책을 제대로 하기 시작했어요ㅠㅠ 주인 몸에도 감을 수 있어서 두손 사용하기 편하니 완전 주인도 아이도 너무 룰루랄라한 산책이 가능하답니다.

색갈도 너무 이쁘고 기능도 좋고. 목줄이 없다면 안살 이유가 없어요! 개인적인 바람으로는 야광 목줄도 나왔으면 좋겠어요!!
reviews.content_en: Honestly, I was that sad owner who thought leashes are definitely bad for small dogs. At first, that's why I used a harness leash. But my pup really didn't like walks and kept being stubborn about not wanting to go. So from then on I wondered what the problem was. At first I trained hard. But around the time I was getting tired of it feeling like we were just walking in place, I remembered my dog's personality. He doesn't really like being held and doesn't like being touched much, so a harness?! That's when I immediately bought a leash. Sorry for the long backstory! After using this leash, my pup finally started taking proper walks 😭😭 And since I can wrap it around my body I can use both hands, so now both owner and pup can enjoy lovely, carefree walks! The color is so pretty and the function is great. There's no reason not to get this leash! Personally I'd love to see a reflective leash version!

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content:
2년반정도 바잇미 방수리드줄 노란색 엄청 잘 사용했어요!! 매일 3번 산책 나갈때마다 바잇미 방수리드줄만 사용했는데 이번 크리스마스 이브에 갑자기 연결고리가 헐거워져서 새로 구매했습니다 s사이즈로 구매했다가 원래 쓰던게 m사이즈였던걸 알고 m사이즈로 교환받았습니다! 보라색 리드줄도 잘 쓰고 있는데 노란색이 너무 예뻐요!! 
이 리드줄 장점은 방수가 돼서 언제든 사용가능하고 일반 리드줄은 손이 쓸릴때가 있는데 요건 손 쓸릴일이 없어요 진짜 좋아서 이걸로 재구매했습니다 다음에 구매할 땐 노란색으로 재구매할게요😄
reviews.content_en: I've been using the BITE ME waterproof leash in yellow for about 2.5 years and it's amazing!! I use the BITE ME waterproof leash every time we go out for our 3 daily walks, but on Christmas Eve the connection ring suddenly loosened so I bought a new one. I ordered size S but found out my original was size M so I exchanged it! I'm also using the purple leash well, but the yellow is so pretty!! The advantage of this leash is that it's waterproof so you can use it anytime, and while regular leashes can irritate your hands, this one never does. I really loved it so much I repurchased it. Next time I'll definitely get the yellow again 😄

reviews.name: 전****
reviews.content:
색상도 예쁘고 부드럽고 탄탄해 보여요 다만 때가 잘 탈것 같기도한 재질이라서 사용후 가끔씩 닦아서 보관해야 할듯합니다
수영을 즐기는 보더콜리~ 올여름 수영장용으로 준비해 놓았어요^^
참고로 저희아가는 목둘레 42이고 L가 잘 맞아요
세일 자주 했음 좋겠어요~~♡
reviews.content_en: The color is pretty and it looks soft and sturdy. The only thing is the material seems to pick up dirt easily so you'll need to wipe it down occasionally and store it carefully. Our Border Collie loves swimming~ I got this ready for the pool this summer 😊😊 By the way, my pup's neck is 42cm and L fits perfectly. I wish you'd have sales more often~ ♡

reviews.name: 최****
reviews.content:
워터프루프에 꽂혀서 샀는데 색도 이쁘고 마감부분들이나 이런것도 신경써서 만든 제품같아요
끈이 매끈매끈 완벽방수재질에 탄력이 있는 재질입니다
다만 끈이 좀 많이 무거워요.
저는 괜찮은데 목걸이가 강아지가 살짝 무거울꺼 같다는 생각은 했습니다. 물놀이 자주가는 분 아니면 굳이라는 생각입니다
reviews.content_en: I bought it because I was hooked on the waterproof feature, and the color is pretty and it seems like a product made with attention to detail in finishes and such. The cord is smooth and perfectly waterproof with elasticity. However, the cord is quite heavy. It's fine for me, but I did think the leash might be a bit heavy for my dog. If you don't go swimming often, I'd say it's not really necessary.

reviews.name: 경****
reviews.content:
너무너무 예뻐요 색감 짱 
근데 아쉬운 점은 계절을 잘못 선택한 것 같아요 핸즈프리라 요즘 같이 추운 날 주머니 손 넣고 쓰기 너무 좋긴한데 재질이 천이 아니고 차가워지는? 소재라 밖에서 만지고 싶지 않아요 ㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋ 여름에 살 걸 또 생각보다 먼지가 잘 붙어서 산책 다녀오고 물티슈로 슥 닦으면 때가 때가 엄청나요 
그래도 핸즈프리라는 점과 디자인에서 점수 다 드렸어요
reviews.content_en: It's so so pretty, the color is amazing! But the downside is I think I chose the wrong season lol Since it's hands-free it's super convenient for putting my hands in my pockets on cold days like now, but because the material isn't fabric and gets cold, I don't want to touch it outside lol lol lol I should've bought it in summer. Also, surprisingly a lot of dust sticks to it, so after a walk if I wipe it with a wet wipe the dirt is crazy. But I still gave it full marks for the hands-free aspect and the design!

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content: 너무너무 귀여워요 여름/겨울 아주 유용할것같고 생각보다는 때가 잘타요 ㅠㅠ일부러ㅜ바닷가 가서 사용하려고 준비해서 사용했는데 최고였어요
reviews.content_en: It's so so cute! 🥰 It seems like it'll be really useful for summer and winter, but it does stain more easily than I expected ㅠㅠ I specially prepared it to use at the beach and it was amazing!

reviews.name: 최****
reviews.content:
하네스만 채우다가 웰컴딜기회로 주문했는데
너무 예쁘고 귀여워요..!
재질도 정말 특이한거 같아요.첨엔 털이 들러붙으면 어쩌지?라고 생각했는데 전혀~~~
색깔이  너무 상큼하니  귀여워요!
방수재질이라 여름엔 더 유용하지 싶습니다!ㅎ
reviews.content_en: I was just using a harness, but I ordered it during the welcome deal and it's so pretty and cute..! The material seems really unique. At first I was worried about fur sticking to it, but not at all~~~ The color is so fresh and adorable! I think it'll be even more useful in summer since it's water-resistant! ㅎ

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
13키로 사모예드 믹스랑 지내고 있습니다! 하네스보다는
목줄을 해야할것 같아서 찾아보다가 발견했는데 색깔이 너무 예뻐서 고르는데 힘들었어요ㅠㅠ!!
고민하다 고른 피스타치오..너무이쁘네요❤️
받자마자 바로 착용하고 산책나갔어요!
사이즈는 아주 넉넉해요!
reviews.content_en: I have a 13kg Samoyed mix! Since I needed a collar more than a harness, I looked around and found this - the color was so pretty it was hard to choose ㅠㅠ!! After some thought, I picked pistachio and it's so beautiful ❤️ I put it on right away and went for a walk! The size is very generous!

reviews.name: 쩡****
reviews.content: 꺄 리드줄이랑 색 다르게 했는데 역시 이뻐요ㅎㅎ같은 색이든 뭐든 다 이쁠것같은데 젤 좋은건 목줄로 바꾸고 앞섬방지도 되고 방수도 되니까 좋아요(ღ’ᴗ’ღ)
reviews.content_en: Omg I got it in a different color from the leash and it looks great ㅎㅎ I think any color combo would look good, but the best part is switching to a collar - it prevents pulling AND it's water-resistant so that's awesome (ღ'ᴗ'ღ)

reviews.name: 주****
reviews.content: 걷기대회 참가했었는데 다른 아이가 요 목줄하고 리드줄 하고 있더라구요~ 산 타는데 나뭇잎이나 흙도 안묻고 너무 좋아보여서 어디 제품인지 물어보고 집 오자마자 바로 구매 했습니다. 생각보다 더 튼튼하고 너무 맘에들어요!!
reviews.content_en: I was at a walking event and I saw another dog wearing this collar and leash combo~ On the trail, it didn't get dirty from leaves or dirt and it looked so good that I asked what product it was, and I bought it as soon as I got home. It's sturdier than I expected and I absolutely love it!!

reviews.name: 구****
reviews.content: 장마 시즌 대비해서 주문해서 잘 쓰고있오요💜 업그레이드 되면서 더 부드러운 소재가 된 거 같고, 컬러감도 너무 맘에 듭니다🫶🫶
reviews.content_en: I ordered it in preparation for rainy season and using it well 💜 It seems like it's become softer material with the upgrade, and I love the color so much 🫶🫶

reviews.name: 정****
reviews.content:
하네스만 있고 목줄이 없어서 구입해 봤어요
사이즈 괜찮고 색상도 이뿌네요
맘에 쏙
reviews.content_en: I only had a harness so I bought this collar. The size is good and the color is pretty. Love it!

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 색도 연보라색에 재질도 실리콘이라 오염에도 끄떡없을꺼같아 안심이에요
reviews.content_en: The color is soft purple and since the material is silicone, I'm relieved that it should be stain-resistant!

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 물건 받자마자 바로 산책 나갔다 왔어요. 기본 2 m 정도로 길어서활동 반경 넓어서 아주 좋고요 허리에 감을 수 있어서 너무 편합니다. 예전에 대형경 키울 때도 큰 사이즈로 사용했었는데 여름이나 겨울에 더러워지지도 않고 젖지 않아서 너무 좋습니다.
reviews.content_en: I took it for a walk right after receiving it. It's about 2m long which gives a nice wide range of movement and it's so convenient to wrap around my waist. I used a larger size when I had a big dog before, and it doesn't get dirty or wet in summer or winter, so it's amazing.

reviews.name: 문****
reviews.content: 넘 예뻐요 ㅜㅜ 이렇게 좋은 제품 싸게 살 수 있어서 좋았어요~
reviews.content_en: It's so pretty ㅜㅜ I was happy to get such a great product at a good price~

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 7개월령 8.5kg 똥갱쥐 M사이즈 잘 맞아요. 하네스보다 목줄을 선호하는데 장마기간이다 보니 기존에 사용중인 목줄이 금방 젖고 더러워지더라고요. 그래서 처음으로 워터푸르프로 구매해봤어요. 산책 다녀온 뒤 물티슈로 쓱 닦아주면 돼서 굉장히 편리합니다! 잘 사용할게요 ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: My 7-month-old pup weighs 8.5kg and the M size fits perfectly! 🐿️ I prefer a collar leash over a harness, but since it's rainy season, my regular leash gets wet and dirty so quickly. That's why I decided to try a waterproof one for the first time. It's super convenient—I just wipe it down with a wet wipe after our walks! I'll definitely be using this regularly hehe

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content:
바잇미어플에서 처음 이 리드줄이 나오자마자
사용해서 파손없이 지금까지 잘쓰고있던 제일 애용하는 산책줄이에요! 아무리 세척한다해도 아스팔트의 검은흔적들 실리콘재질이라 닦이지도않고 해서 사용하는데 문제는없지만! 새로 하나 더 사고싶어서 구매했어요 리뉴얼 되었다고 하는데 비교해보니
줄이 더 얇아졌고 그만큼 부속품도 좀더 작아졌네요! 불편한건없지만 얇아지니 그만큼 덜 튼튼한것같은..?! 연결하는 고리도 작아졌다보니까용 ㅠㅠ 더 좋게 업그레이두! 했다고하니 믿고 잘쓸게요~✨
벌써 10살이 된 개딸! 우리 오늘도 산책가자🤍
reviews.content_en: I started using this leash as soon as it came out on the BITE ME app, and it's been my favorite, most-used walking leash without any damage! Even though no amount of cleaning gets rid of those black asphalt marks on the silicone material, it's still fine to use! I wanted to buy another one, so I did. They said it's been renewed, but when I compared them, the leash is thinner and the accessories are smaller too! Nothing's inconvenient, but since it's thinner it feels a bit less sturdy...?! The connecting ring is smaller too ㅠㅠ They said they upgraded it for the better, so I'll trust them and use it well~✨ My puppy girl just turned 10! Let's go for a walk today too 🤍

reviews.name: 남****
reviews.content:
쓰던걸 준건가요 b급 상품을 준건가요.
펜션 놀러가는데 비온다고해서 주문했더니만 받고보니 누가 반품한걸 준건지 뭔지 고리에 스크레치 나있고 얼룩 안지워지고...
리뷰 남기려고 보니 누구는 b급 상품 구매했다는 리뷰가있는데
저도 b급으로 주신건지요...?
제값 주고 구매한건데 짜증남 ㅠ 
심지어 지금 베스트 상품 아이템에 2만원때 상품도 팔고있는데 그건 2만원때니 그러려니 하겠는데 거즘 5만원 주고 산 난 왜 이모양임?
색깔은 이쁩니다 ㅠ
reviews.content_en: Did you send me a used one? A B-grade product? I ordered it because they said it was going to rain when I was going to a vacation rental, but when I got it, there were scratches on the ring like someone returned it, and the stains won't come off... I was going to leave a review and saw someone else had written that they bought a B-grade product too. Did you send me a B-grade one as well...? I paid full price for this and it's frustrating ㅠ Especially when you're selling items for 20,000 won on the bestseller list right now, I'd understand if that's 20,000 won, but why does mine look like this when I paid almost 50,000 won for it? The color is pretty though ㅠ

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
왜 고민했나싶어요 너무 이뻐요
사세요사세요!!
3키로 포메인데 두꺼울까 걱정했거든요 s사이즈 딱이고
소형견에게 잘 맞게 나왔어요! 
고민하시는 분들 꼭 사세요!!
reviews.content_en: I can't believe I was hesitant about it—it's so pretty! Buy it, seriously!! 💕 I have a 3kg Pomeranian and was worried it might be too thick, but the S size is perfect! It fits small dogs really well! If you're on the fence, definitely buy it!!

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
이뻐요 소재도 맘에 들어요 손바닥 전혀 안아프고 
산책후 물티슈로 슥 닦으면 깨끗해 지고 ....
목줄 10개 넘게 있지만 ㅎㅎ
다른색도 구매할꺼예여
reviews.content_en: It's pretty and I love the material. My hands don't hurt at all, and after a walk I just wipe it with a wet wipe and it comes clean.... I have over 10 leashes hehe but I'm going to buy it in other colors too!

reviews.name: 권****
reviews.content:
강아지 입양하게 되었는데, 날씨도 그렇고 방수 되면 좋을거 같아서 알아보다 디자인이 너-무 ! 예뻐서 구매하게 되었습니당!
강아지 크면 다른 색으로 또 구매 해보려구요! 당근과 메론 색이에요 딱 너무 귀여워요~
reviews.content_en: I just adopted a puppy, and I thought it would be great if it was waterproof considering the weather. I looked into it and the design is SO cute that I ended up buying it! When my puppy grows up, I'm planning to buy it in different colors! It's carrot and melon colored and it's absolutely adorable~

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content: 야외활동을 좋아하는 우리가족에게 아주 적합한 리쉬
reviews.content_en: A perfect leash for our family who loves outdoor activities

reviews.name: 최****
reviews.content: 아프리콧 품절되어 피스타치오로 받았는데 너무 이뻐요~ 다들 잘 어울린다고하고 목욕할때 아직 도망가는데 잡기도좋고 완전 강추합니다
reviews.content_en: The apricot was out of stock so I got pistachio instead and it's so pretty~ Everyone said it looks great on him, and even though he still tries to run away during bath time, it's easy to grab him. I totally recommend it!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 물놀이가거나 우중산책시 우용할듯해서 구입햇는데  색도 이뻐요 목23인토이푸들  사이즈조절되니 맞구요
reviews.content_en: I bought it thinking I'd use it for water play or walks in the rain, and the color is really pretty! My toy poodle has a 23cm neck and the size is adjustable so it fits perfectly

reviews.name: 변****
reviews.content:
방수줄이라 쉽게 때도 안타고 너무 편하네요
크로스로 메고 산책하기도 충분한 길이라 양손의 자유를 맛보고 있어요
reviews.content_en: Since it's a waterproof leash, it doesn't get dirty easily and it's so convenient! I wear it crossbody when I go for walks and the length is perfect for it, so I'm finally experiencing the freedom of having both hands free!

reviews.name: 백****
reviews.content:
비가올때나눈이올때나 여름에물놀이할때나 딱!!
쵝오네요..번거롭게 목줄을뺐다꼈다할필요없습니다
강추강추
reviews.content_en: Perfect for rainy days, snowy days, or summer water play!! It's awesome.. You don't need the hassle of taking the leash on and off. Highly recommend!

reviews.name: 윤****
reviews.content: 방수라서 마음에 들어요~목에 잘 맞아요~색깔이 이뻐요~^^
reviews.content_en: I love that it's waterproof~ It fits well around the neck~ The color is pretty~^^

reviews.name: 사****
reviews.content: 여기서 구매한 워터 목걸이는 제가 라지로 사서 아예 못 쓰고 있는데 이건 잘 쓸 것 같아요 ㅋㅋㅋ
reviews.content_en: I bought a water collar from here in large size and haven't been able to use it at all, but I think this one will work great lol

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
장마철에 관리 하기  쉬울거 같아서 구입 했어요.
만족도는 최상 역시 편리 하네요.
가슴줄만 사용했는데 이번엔 목줄 주문했는데 적응력도 최고입니다.
reviews.content_en: I bought it because it seemed easy to manage during the rainy season. I'm very satisfied - it's really convenient. I only used the chest harness before, but this time I ordered the collar and the adaptability is amazing.

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 전에 쓰던 목줄도 바잇미제품이었는데 오래 썼더니 연결부품이 부러져서 다시 샀어요 색상도 이쁘고 방수라서 좋아요
reviews.content_en: My previous collar was also a BITE ME product, but after using it for a long time the connector broke so I bought a new one. The color is pretty and it's waterproof which is great

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 핸즈프리라 손이 자유로워서 산책할 때 편리하고 방수가 되어서 눈 비 올 때 좋은 것 같아요.
reviews.content_en: Since it's hands-free, my hands are free which makes walks convenient, and since it's waterproof it's great for rainy or snowy days.

reviews.name: 윤****
reviews.content: 리드줄이랑 찰떡입니당 💖 애기한테 잘 어울리고 부드러워요 (죄다 흔들리는사진 뿐 ..)
reviews.content_en: It goes perfectly with the leash 💖 It looks great on my baby and it's soft (all the pictures are just blurry though ..)

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content: 손이 자유로워서 인간도 편하네요^^ 색감도 예쁘고 만족합니다.
reviews.content_en: Having free hands is convenient for us too^^ The color is pretty and I'm satisfied.

reviews.name: 임****
reviews.content:
색도 너무 귀엽고 저희집 강쥐랑 잘 어울려서 좋아요!
다른색도 구매하고싶어요 ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: The color is so cute and it matches my pup so well! I want to buy it in other colors too hehe

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content:
쓰기도 편하고 방수된다해서 구매했는데
컬러도 이쁘네용ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: It's convenient to use and waterproof so I bought it, and the color is pretty too lol

reviews.name: 살****
reviews.content:
컬러감이 이쁘네요
소재도 튼튼해요
3,3키로 잘맞아요
reviews.content_en:
The color looks really nice 😊
The material is sturdy too
Fits my 3.3kg pup perfectly

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 방수가 되어서 좋고 세척도 간편해요.
reviews.content_en: It's waterproof which is great, and so easy to clean.

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 너무이뻐요! 잘사용할게요! 담번엔 다른색상 또사야겟어요!
reviews.content_en: It's so pretty! I'll definitely use it well! I need to get another color next time!

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content: 색감쨍하고 가볍고 젛아요
reviews.content_en: Vibrant color, lightweight, and perfect fit

reviews.name: 신****
reviews.content: 색감 너무 이쁘구 특히 방수라서 너무 좋네요 ㅎ
reviews.content_en: The color is so pretty, and I especially love that it's waterproof 😊

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
이런재질 첨사용해서 첨엔 무뎌서  불편했는대
물놀이나 우중산책시 실용적이네요
예쁘네요
reviews.content_en:
First time using this material so it felt a bit stiff at first, which was inconvenient
But it's really practical for water play and rainy walks
And it looks so nice

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
길이가 길어서 긴 목줄 찾으시는 분들께 추천합니다!
비오는날 사용하고싶어서 구매했는데
평소에도 사용하고 있어요~
밝은 색상 사용하니 금방 더러워지긴 하네요
reviews.content_en:
The length is long so I'd recommend it to anyone looking for a longer leash!
I bought it to use on rainy days
but I've been using it regularly now ~
The bright color does get dirty pretty quickly though

reviews.name: 차****
reviews.content: 비오고 눈올때 방수용이 필요해서 구매했는데 컬러가 너무 예뻐요!
reviews.content_en: I bought it because I needed a waterproof leash for rainy and snowy days, and the color is so pretty!

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content: 색깔 너무 예쁘네요 방수 돼서 좋아툐
reviews.content_en: The color is so nice, and I love that it's waterproof

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
전에 다른 색상 구매하고 재구매한뒤 같이 개봉했습니다 늦게 개봉하고 같은 제품이라 후기 올려요
꺼내서 사이즈 맞추려고 목에 댔더니 갑자기 깨갱 거려서 보니 플라스틱 부분 마감이 뽀족하게 되어 있더라구요 좋은 제품인데 좀 아쉽기도하고 안전성의 문제도 있어 올립니다 사용전 잘 확인하시고 바잇미에서도 검수 부탁드려요 전 니퍼로 떼어내고 거친 파일로 갈아내서 사용하고 있습니다
reviews.content_en:
I purchased a different color before and reordered, then opened them together. Since I opened it late and it's the same product, I'm leaving a review.
When I took it out and held it up to my pup's neck to check the size, it suddenly made a scratching sound. I checked and found the plastic part has a sharp finish on the edges. It's a good product but I'm a bit disappointed and concerned about the safety issue, so I'm posting this. Please check carefully before use and BITE ME, I'd appreciate it if you could do quality control too. I removed it with nippers and filed down the rough edges with a file before using it.
